suite.name: Easypaisa Job Portal

test.name: Create Task

kw.name: Authorize
kw.doc: Authorize user to SMTP and IMAP servers.
kw.msg: SMTPAuthenticationError: (535, b'5.7.8 Username and Password not accepted. For more information, go to\n5.7.8 https://support.google.com/mail/?p=BadCredentials 98e67ed59e1d1-380534089ecsm1177860a91.12 - gsmtp')

test.status: Setup failed: SMTPAuthenticationError: (535, b'5.7.8 Username and Password not accepted. For more information, go to\n5.7.8 https://support.google.com/mail/?p=BadCredentials 98e67ed59e1d1-380534089ecsm1177860a91.12 - gsmtp')

kw.name: Run Keyword If Any Tests Failed
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if one or more tests failed.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
kw.msg: Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.

kw.name: Send Message
kw.arg: body="this message is sent to inform you about the bot failure "
kw.msg: FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: 'Failure_Screenshot.png'

kw.status: FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: 'Failure_Screenshot.png'

suite.status: Suite teardown failed: FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: 'Failure_Screenshot.png'

errors.msg: This is a deprecated import that will be removed in favor of Autosphere.Browser.Selenium
Imported library 'D:\hello world\credentials.py' contains no keywords.
